message:
fix: avoid splitting compaction history in middle of tool_call/tool_result pair

Walk splitIndex backward past any tool-role messages so the preserved
recent window never starts with an orphaned tool result. If that walk
reaches the beginning, skip compaction entirely since there's nothing
meaningful to summarize.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
